questions.question_text: Write a detailed note on the public administration under Muslim rule in India.
Critically examine the origin and growth of the East India Company as an imperialist power in India.
Give an historical account of the growth of Hindu nationalism during 1858-1947.
Evaluate the causes and effects of the Khilafat Movement on the Muslim struggle for independence.
Discuss the outcomes of the three sessions of the Round Table Conference.
Critically evaluate the role of political parties in the separation of East Pakistan in 1971.
Write a short note on Kargil War.
Write a short note on 1984 Referendum.
Write a short note on Allahabad Address 1930.
